name: 04-28-tavern-interior-ui
title: Tavern Interior UI Enhancement
description: Enhance tavern interior UI with real character avatars, scene backgrounds, and atmosphere display.
creator: lijin
notes: Enhanced TavernInterior.jsx with: 1) CharAvatar component for real character sprites/avatars, 2) Layout style based backgrounds (lobby/quest-play/npc-chat/hybrid-room), 3) Scene atmosphere banner displaying scene_prompt, 4) Layout-specific accent colors. Added ~150 lines of CSS styles for tavern-interior component.
